title: Home Collection Black A4 Certificate Photo Frame with Clear Plastic Front Panel
features: This simple black plastic design frame is ideal for displaying certificates, photos or pictures.
Fits A4 size (210 x 297 millimetres or 8.27 x 11.69 inches) paper.
Includes a clip for mounting on the wall, and a fold-out stand for displaying on a shelf or desk. Can be displayed in Landscape or Portrait orientation.
Ideal for , pictures and photographs, Home, Office, Workplaces, Can be Used for Gifting Purposed.
The A4 Certificate Frame is the perfect way to show off your commendations and awards, whether its your child's good grades or your university degree.
